name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and UK, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating it is a publicly traded, established financial services company.

FirstCash's core business focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse loans), retail sales of merchandise, and gold/precious metal buying. They buy and sell jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also offers layaway services with 10% down payment options and operates a subsidiary (AFF) providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale as the international market leader in pawn retail, extensive geographic footprint making it accessible across North America and Latin America, and integration of technology-driven point-of-sale systems. Their "What We Buy" program emphasizes broad merchandise acceptance and immediate cash payment, while their layaway service provides an alternative to traditional lending for consumers seeking installment purchases.

As a pawn lender, FirstCash serves consumers who need fast cash access using personal assets as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical possessions, which carries risk of losing pledged items if loans aren't repaid. Additionally, pawn loans typically carry higher effective interest rates compared to traditional bank loans, though they remain accessible to credit-constrained consumers who may not qualify for conventional financing.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America ensures convenient access for customers
Non-recourse pawn loans mean borrowers are not personally liable beyond the pledged collateral—no deficiency judgments
Fast cash on-the-spot for gold, jewelry, and other merchandise without credit checks
Immediate payment for items sold to FirstCash, providing instant liquidity
Publicly traded company (S&P 400, Russell 2000) with transparent financial reporting and established operational standards
Layaway service offers 10% down alternative for customers who prefer installment-based retail purchasing
Wide variety of merchandise accepted including electronics, tools, appliances, and musical instruments—not limited to jewelry
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical possessions, creating risk of losing sentimental or essential items if unable to repay
Pawn loan interest rates are typically high compared to traditional bank loans, though specific rates not disclosed on website
Limited transparency on loan terms, repayment periods, and APR ranges on their public website—details require store visit or contact
Liquidation of pledged items may occur at significant discounts below original value if redemption period expires
Retail merchandise quality and inventory varies by location; no guarantee of finding specific items needed
best_for: Credit-constrained consumers who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans but need immediate cash
Individuals with valuable personal assets (electronics, jewelry, tools, instruments) they're willing to use as collateral
Customers seeking fast, same-day cash without lengthy credit application processes
Budget-conscious shoppers interested in purchasing discounted used merchandise or trying layaway options
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for credit-constrained consumers who own valuable personal property and need fast cash without credit checks or background approval. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral with risk of forfeiture, and effective interest rates are typically higher than traditional lending alternatives, making this suitable only for urgent cash needs rather than long-term financing.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Gold and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
General merchandise buying ("We buy almost anything of value")
Store locator and inventory search tools
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary and 15,000+ merchant partners
Online store locator with 2,500+ store locations
